name: Spotify
description: Control playback, search music, manage playlists and library via Spotify Web API
author: Robert (Deathwing)

auth.help_text: Sign in with your Spotify account. Requires a Spotify Developer App — set the redirect URI to clawdroid://oauth/callback in your app dashboard.

tools.name: spotify_get_playback
tools.description: Get current playback state including track, device, volume, shuffle, and repeat status.

test_cases.name: Check current playback
test_cases.user_prompt: What song is currently playing on Spotify?

tools.name: spotify_play
tools.description: Start or resume playback. Optionally specify a Spotify URI to play a specific track, album, artist, or playlist.

parameters.name: uri
parameters.description: Spotify URI to play (e.g. spotify:track:xxx, spotify:album:xxx, spotify:playlist:xxx). Omit to resume current playback.

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: Target device ID. Omit to use the active device.

tools.name: spotify_pause
tools.description: Pause playback on the active device.

tools.name: spotify_next
tools.description: Skip to the next track.

tools.name: spotify_previous
tools.description: Skip to the previous track.

tools.name: spotify_set_volume
tools.description: Set the playback volume.

tools.name: spotify_set_shuffle
tools.description: Enable or disable shuffle mode.

tools.name: spotify_set_repeat
tools.description: Set the repeat mode.

tools.name: spotify_add_to_queue
tools.description: Add a track or episode to the playback queue.

parameters.name: uri
parameters.description: Spotify URI of the track or episode to queue.

test_cases.name: Add to queue
test_cases.user_prompt: Add the song with URI spotify:track:6rqhFgbbKwnb9MLmUQDhG6 to my Spotify queue

tools.name: spotify_get_queue
tools.description: Get the current playback queue.

tools.name: spotify_search
tools.description: Search Spotify for tracks, albums, artists, or playlists.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Comma-separated types: track, album, artist, playlist. Default 'track'.

test_cases.name: Search for a song
test_cases.user_prompt: Search Spotify for 'Bohemian Rhapsody' by Queen

tools.name: spotify_list_playlists
tools.description: List the user's playlists.

tools.name: spotify_get_playlist
tools.description: Get details and tracks of a specific playlist.

tools.name: spotify_create_playlist
tools.description: Create a new playlist for the current user.

test_cases.name: Create a playlist
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a new Spotify playlist called 'Workout Mix'

tools.name: spotify_add_to_playlist
tools.description: Add tracks to a playlist.

parameters.name: uris
parameters.description: Comma-separated Spotify track URIs to add.

tools.name: spotify_remove_from_playlist
tools.description: Remove tracks from a playlist.

parameters.name: uris
parameters.description: Comma-separated Spotify track URIs to remove.

tools.name: spotify_get_saved_tracks
tools.description: Get the user's saved (liked) tracks.

tools.name: spotify_save_tracks
tools.description: Save (like) tracks to the user's library.

parameters.name: track_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated Spotify track IDs to save.

tools.name: spotify_remove_saved_tracks
tools.description: Remove (unlike) tracks from the user's library.

parameters.name: track_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated Spotify track IDs to remove.

tools.name: spotify_get_top_items
tools.description: Get the user's top artists or tracks based on listening history.

test_cases.name: Get top tracks
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me my most listened to songs on Spotify

tools.name: spotify_get_recently_played
tools.description: Get the user's recently played tracks.

test_cases.name: Recently played
test_cases.user_prompt: What songs have I listened to recently on Spotify?

tools.name: spotify_update_playlist_details
tools.description: Change a playlist's name, description, or public/private state.

tools.name: spotify_get_playlist_items
tools.description: Get a playlist's tracks with pagination support.

tools.name: spotify_reorder_playlist_items
tools.description: Reorder tracks within a playlist.

parameters.name: range_start
parameters.description: Position of the first track to move (0-based).

parameters.name: range_length
parameters.description: Number of tracks to move. Default 1.

tools.name: spotify_replace_playlist_items
tools.description: Replace all tracks in a playlist with the given tracks.

tools.name: spotify_get_playlist_cover_image
tools.description: Get the cover image(s) of a playlist.

tools.name: spotify_set_playlist_cover_image
tools.description: Set a custom cover image for a playlist. Image must be base64-encoded JPEG, max 256KB.

parameters.name: image_base64
parameters.description: Base64-encoded JPEG image data (no data: prefix).

tools.name: spotify_get_track
tools.description: Get details of a specific track.

tools.name: spotify_get_album
tools.description: Get details and track listing of an album.

tools.name: spotify_get_artist
tools.description: Get details of an artist.

tools.name: spotify_get_artist_top_tracks
tools.description: Get an artist's top tracks.

tools.name: spotify_get_artist_albums
tools.description: Get an artist's albums.

parameters.name: include_groups
parameters.description: Comma-separated: album, single, appears_on, compilation. Default 'album,single'.

tools.name: spotify_get_related_artists
tools.description: Get artists related to a given artist.

tools.name: spotify_get_recommendations
tools.description: Get track recommendations based on seed tracks, artists, or genres.

parameters.name: seed_tracks
parameters.description: Comma-separated track IDs (up to 5 total seeds).

parameters.name: seed_artists
parameters.description: Comma-separated artist IDs (up to 5 total seeds).

parameters.name: seed_genres
parameters.description: Comma-separated genre names (up to 5 total seeds).
